---
title: "Introduction to Social Research Methodology"
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/sync-teaching.py from the Teaching repo.
     Do not edit by hand — re-run build.sh (or the script) to regenerate. -->

<p class="teaching-back"><a href="../teaching.html">← All courses</a></p>

## Slides

1. [The nature and purpose of social research](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/social-research-methodology-1-slides)

## Handouts

- [The nature and purpose of social research](https://bdstanley.netlify.app/social-research-methodology-1-handout)
